steps.description: AI analyses chemical inventories, SDSs, and process conditions to identify workplace hazards: exposure risks, incompatible storage, reaction hazards, and regulatory non-compliance. Continuous monitoring of 5,000+ chemicals.
steps.businessRationale: AI hazard identification catches 25% more risks than manual assessments. Proactive identification prevents incidents that average £2M in direct costs and £8M in consequential losses.

steps.description: AI processes real-time data from personal exposure monitors, area detectors, and environmental sensors. Predicts exposure levels based on process conditions, ventilation, and worker proximity to sources.
steps.businessRationale: Real-time exposure monitoring reduces occupational illness by 40%. Predictive alerts enable intervention before exposure limits are reached, protecting workers and preventing regulatory action.

steps.description: AI analyses near-miss data, maintenance records, and process deviations to predict incident probabilities. Generates safety recommendations, automates permit-to-work processes, and manages lockout/tagout procedures.
steps.businessRationale: Predictive safety analytics reduce lost-time injuries by 35%. Automated permit systems prevent 80% of procedural safety breaches that lead to serious incidents.

steps.description: AI manages emergency response: chemical spill modelling, plume dispersion prediction, evacuation route optimization, and decontamination protocol selection. Provides first responder briefing with chemical hazard data.
steps.businessRationale: AI emergency response reduces containment time by 50%. Accurate plume modelling protects surrounding communities and prevents evacuations costing £500K per incident.

steps.description: AI manages REACH, CLP, COMAH, and COSHH compliance: tracks regulatory changes, maintains SDS databases, generates COSHH assessments, and monitors reportable quantities. Automated regulatory reporting.
steps.businessRationale: Automated compliance management prevents £5M+ in regulatory fines. Proactive REACH tracking avoids supply chain disruption from substance restrictions worth £20M annually.

steps.description: AI generates safety performance reports: incident rates, near-miss trends, exposure statistics, compliance status, training completion, and safety culture metrics. Benchmarks against industry standards.
steps.businessRationale: Safety reporting drives continuous improvement and regulatory confidence. Best-in-class safety performance reduces insurance premiums by 20% and attracts talent in competitive markets.
